name: @act-spec/example-nextjs-marketing
description: Next.js + Contentful + next-intl + React marketing site demonstrating multi-source ACT generation with localized content and component-extracted blocks.

scripts.conformance: pnpm run build && pnpm run validate
scripts.test: node -e "console.log('@act-spec/example-nextjs-marketing: example exercises end-to-end via conformance')"
scripts.lint: node -e "console.log('@act-spec/example-nextjs-marketing: lint covered by typecheck + conformance')"
